raw.message:
Pegue seu Codiguin Free Fire exclusivo com Snickers!
Ative seu Conjunto Snickers grátis! É rápido e fácil.
Link na bio!
#Freefire #freefirebrasil #snickersFF #SocialFF #Freefirememe

hook.summary: Showcasing an exclusive Snickers-themed skin in-game using a POV trend.
hook.visual_action: A character sits on a golden throne in a grassy field wearing a Snickers-branded outfit and bunny ears.
hook.text_overlay: POV: ESPERANDO O RESTO DO SQUAD RESGATAR A SKIN SNICKERS® PRA USAR NA PÁSCOA

scene_flow: In-game footage of a character on a throne wearing the Snickers skin.
Transition to a graphic of a Snickers bar and the 'Skin Exclusiva' announcement.
Character emote animation with blue energy effects.
Final CTA screen with instructions to register the receipt.
on_screen_text: POV: ESPERANDO O RESTO DO SQUAD RESGATAR A SKIN SNICKERS® PRA USAR NA PÁSCOA
Cadastre a nota fiscal da compra no site!
cta_text: Cadastre a nota fiscal da compra no site!
audience_proxy: Competitive mobile gamers in Brazil who play Free Fire and enjoy limited-edition brand collaborations.
